author: codex-pm-audit-extraction

patch.value: Extract governance audit runtime from the default CLI and SDK
Execute pm-vjk3 as a package-owned boundary migration with bare-core contract removal, installed-package parity, exhaustive verification, and hosted review convergence.

message: plan create (search: pm-audit audit commands flags SDK package extraction)

patch.value: Move every audit command, flag, handler, contract, SDK export, MCP parameter, completion entry, and audit-specific documentation surface from core into packages/pm-governance-audit.

Continue on agent/extract-governance-audit-from-core-runtime. Read pm-vjk3 and children live. Decision pm-fg0b chose hybrid registerFlags/package handlers, audit alias, --force fallback, and no public audit SDK surface.

value.title: Inventory imports and public SDK gaps before moving implementations
Relocate four audit runtimes into pm-governance-audit and remove SDK exports
Move files/docs audit reporting and allow-audit flags behind package activation
Purge core contracts MCP completion help docs and SDK audit surface
Migrate coverage and prove bare-core versus installed-package parity
Run release gates regenerate changelog and record tracker evidence
Publish PR converge all checks and AI review feedback then merge

patch.value: Live lineage and D1/D2 read; beginning source and SDK boundary inventory.
Mapped every moved runtime import. Public SDK already covered most primitives; filed pm-yu6d for isTerminalStatus/runUpdate/runClose before promoting them.
Four implementations moved to packages/pm-governance-audit; dynamic audit-runner imports and public SDK audit exports removed; install-safe SDK adapter added.
Package registers files/docs --audit and all allow-audit flag families; core registrations removed; bare help omits them and installed package restores them.
Removed static audit contracts, MCP parameters, help, completion, SDK exports, and core/plugin docs references; package README owns the surface.
Real temp project proved bare-core absence and pm install audit restoration; package doctor and four command smokes passed.
pnpm release:gates passed typecheck, docs/skills, static-quality, token-budget, and 278 files / 5592 tests at literal 100% coverage; tracker evidence linked and ready for final changelog generation.

Continuation resumed on PR #536: first preserve and verify inherited bot fixes, run a fresh repo-wide audit-boundary inventory, close any remaining core CLI/SDK audit surfaces, run focused/full/package/temp-project gates, publish the new head, then complete thread-aware bot acknowledgement and current-head CI convergence before merge.

## Continuation closeout plan (2026-07-13)

1. Inventory the entire current diff and every PR review/thread/check, preserving inherited uncommitted bot fixes.
2. Run a repo-wide semantic audit-boundary sweep across src, SDK exports/contracts, MCP schemas, completion/help/guidance, docs, tests, package manifests, and generated fixtures; classify legitimate generic governance/history uses versus audit functionality that must move.
3. Implement every remaining boundary correction inside packages/pm-governance-audit, with bare-core negative assertions and installed-package parity assertions.
4. Run focused tests, contracts/snapshots, lint/static/token gates, full coverage/release gates, and an isolated installed-package temp-project proof.
5. Record files/docs/tests and evidence in pm-rxp1, regenerate the package-owned changelog only after the final tracker mutation, commit with detailed lineage, and push PR #536.
6. Trigger all configured AI reviewers on the pushed head, wait once for the complete review/check window (no polling), inventory all top-level reviews and inline threads, react according to usefulness, reply inline with disposition/evidence, resolve addressed threads, and repeat after every pushed fix.
7. Re-read all edited/new comments and reactions, confirm all required GitHub checks are green on the exact head, merge, return to main, and verify merged-head health.

No core audit-named command, flag, public SDK symbol/type, MCP parameter, completion/help contract, or audit execution path is acceptable. Generic ownership enforcement, validate/health governance, and history-integrity semantics remain core only where they are not audit package functionality.

value.author: codex-pm-audit-extraction
value.text: Step 7 pre-push evidence: the continuation boundary inventory found and removed remaining files/docs audit types/runtime, named bypass options/result markers, audit-smoke telemetry context, and PRD surface. Generic command_result extension plumbing now lets the package own result decoration. Full release:gates and exact 100% coverage pass; isolated bare-vs-installed proof passes. Next state is commit/push followed by current-head hosted review convergence.

patch.value: PR #536 current head be232cb0 passed all required hosted checks; Greptile 5/5 no findings, CodeRabbit green, all bot records voted/replied, zero unresolved threads, and final typed-normalizer feedback implemented with passing lint/type/package tests.

value.author: codex-pm-audit-extraction
value.text: Plan complete: all seven steps delivered. Exact-head evidence is recorded on pm-rxp1; PR #536 is clean and mergeable with all required checks green and every review disposition complete.

patch.value: All audit extraction plan steps completed with package-owned runtime/flags/results, audit-free bare contracts, installed parity, exact 100% coverage, and hosted review convergence.
